ParamConstructor.summary: Initializes an object instance with the supplied values.

ID.summary: Gets or sets the ID value.

DataSiteID.summary: Gets or sets the database ID.

DataModuleID.summary: Gets or sets the parent table row ID.

DataModuleSiteID.summary: Gets or sets the parent database ID.

SchemaName.summary: Gets or sets the schema name.

NewName.summary: Gets or sets the new name.

ModuleName.summary: Gets or sets the Join module name.

ChangedNames.summary: Gets a reference to the ChangedNames list.
